title: Stability constants, Kstab
summary: 9701 A Level — stability constants, ligand strength, and predicting substitution equilibria.
learningObjectives: Compare stability of complexes with different ligands.
Use Kstab data to predict reaction direction.

simpleExplanation.title: How stable is the complex?
simpleExplanation.summary: Large Kstab means the complex forms readily. Stronger ligands displace weaker ones from coordination sites.
steps: NH₃ often stronger ligand than H₂O.
Excess Cl⁻ shifts Cu²⁺ from aqua to chloro complex.
Overall β = product of stepwise K values.

sections.content: **Kstab** (28.5) appears in **equilibrium** calculations. Quote **Kstab values** from the data booklet when provided.
